name: Oklo Inc.
description: Oklo Inc. develops advanced fission power plants and fuel recycling technology aimed at delivering clean, reliable power for industrial sites and data-center-style loads.

technology.summary: Oklo is building advanced fission reactors and a fuel recycling strategy intended to supply compact, reliable nuclear power at customer sites.
technology.world_impact: If commercialized, the platform could offer firm low-carbon power for AI data centers, defense, and industrial facilities that need 24/7 energy.
technology.scientific_mechanism: The thesis depends on whether Oklo can translate advanced fission reactor design and fuel-cycle know-how into a licensable, repeatable onsite power system.
technology.proof_status: Conceptual and development-stage proof exists, but commercial proof at sustained operating scale remains outstanding.
technology.feasibility: Moderate. The technical vision is plausible, but licensing, reactor deployment, manufacturing scale, and execution timing remain major hurdles.
engineering_bottlenecks: Licensing the first commercial design and site
Building repeatable reactor manufacturing and fuel logistics
Proving that early projects can reach durable uptime and cost targets
constraints: Execution risk on first commercial reactor
competitor_technologies: Gas-fired generation for AI data centers
technology.preferred_technology: Advanced fission reactors with high-capacity-factor onsite power
technology.preferred_rationale: The attraction is reliable carbon-free power for energy-hungry customers, but the thesis only works if licensing and deployment execution hold.
technology.cost_curve: The long-term appeal is 24/7 clean power for energy-intensive customers, but the near-term cost curve still depends on first-project execution and financing terms.
technology.timeline: The key timeline is first commercial deployment, then proof that early reactors can operate reliably enough to unlock broader adoption.
technology.regulatory_path: Regulatory approval is a gating variable rather than a routine step; it should be treated as one of the primary milestones in the investment case.
manufacturing_dependencies: Project delivery and site construction execution
technology.capital_intensity: High before revenue scale. Oklo must fund engineering, licensing, project development, and early deployment before mature cash generation exists.
failure_modes: The first commercial reactor slips materially beyond the planned timeline
Capital needs force repeated dilution before operating proof exists
Alternative power solutions satisfy customer demand faster or more cheaply

sources.title: Oklo investor materials
sources.snippet: Company materials frame Oklo around advanced fission power plants and fuel recycling for reliable onsite clean power.

sources.title: Oklo quote page
sources.snippet: Yahoo Finance reflected Oklo as a public, pre-revenue company with a sizable market cap and visible balance-sheet cash.

sources.title: MarketWatch coverage on Oklo expectations
sources.snippet: MarketWatch emphasized how much of the Oklo thesis still depends on commercialization timing and expectations.

open_unknowns: When the first commercial reactor actually reaches sustained operation
How much dilution is required before steady-state cash generation
Whether customer demand converts into durable, financeable projects

sources.title: OKLO stock page
sources.snippet: Robinhood confirmed OKLO as an actively listed public equity.

stock.commentary: Yahoo Finance's 2026-01-21 page showed a 14.184B market cap, 11.66x price-to-book, and no TTM revenue. MarketWatch characterized Oklo as a pre-revenue nuclear company whose revenue is not expected until late 2027.
